instruction: Navigate to the position where the head RGB camera would produce the same view as the provided image.
Using only the provided delta actions (2D displacement vectors in world coordinates), infer where the starting location was and navigate back to it.
Satisfy the following relation: The pepper shaker is on the countertop.
Satisfy the following relation: The tray is under the bowl.
Satisfy the following relation: The toothbrush is inside the beaker.
